appraisal_events.evidence: « je ne tiens pas excessivement à le voir… il voudrait… que je fasse la connaissance de sa femme et de sa fille… j’aime mieux éviter qu’il me le demande »; « ces deux créatures »
appraisal_events.explanation: The duchess preemptively refuses Swann’s dying wish to introduce his wife and daughter, avoiding him and derogating them, which enacts a clear social exclusion.

status_effects.explanation: He is actively avoided and denied the audience needed to present his family, constituting a strong local exclusion.
